title: Immortal Nokia Totem
description: Replaces the Totem of Undying with the legendary Nokia 3310 phone.
body:
# Immortal Nokia Totem

Replaces the Totem of Undying with the legendary Nokia 3310 phone.

This resource pack adds a pixelated Nokia phone as your totem while keeping the vanilla Minecraft style. Perfect for PvP, survival, meme gameplay, and cursed screenshots.

## Features
- Custom Nokia 3310 totem texture
- Transparent background
- Pixelated retro look
- Works on most modern Minecraft versions
- Lightweight and simple

## Compatibility
Supports most versions from 1.14 up to 26.1.2.

## Notes
Probably stronger than netherite.
